title: Add a Form to the Homepage?
excerpt: We have a form in a board that we would like to be available on the homepage. How can I add it?

posts.author: DrGerry (Gerald)
posts.cookedHtml: We have a form in a board that we would like to be available on the homepage. How can I add it?

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Gerald!

At this time it isn’t currently possible to customise the homepage with a specific form, I apologise for the setback here

Can you elaborate a little further on your use-case so we can understand how we can help you get set up an alternative way?

posts.author: DrGerry (Gerald)
posts.cookedHtml: Never mind. I will just add it as a text link

posts.author: RichardL (Ricard Leeson)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi @BiancaT, this would interest me as well. We have several different forms we use for various different processes. The user has to either find the link, or go into the workspace to get the form. If we had the forms on the homepage, they could easily select which form then need to fill in.
